category_sources: Official ECL site describes ECL as an implementation of Common Lisp.
source_facts.description says ECL is Embeddable Common Lisp.
display_name_sources: Official ECL site and repository use ECL branding.
source_facts.description expands the project as Embeddable Common Lisp.
docs_sources: Official ECL site hosts the manual under ecl.common-lisp.dev/static/manual/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official ECL site links its Code entry to GitLab, and GitLab describes it as the Embeddable Common-Lisp main repository.
tags_sources: Official GitLab repository topics and description identify Common Lisp compiler/runtime functionality.
